public_reputation: Known around Aurora Crown Commune through day-to-day work as labor foreman.
manner: Counts hands, strain, and failure points at a glance, then speaks like time is already too short. In Aurora Crown Commune, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of labor foreman in and around Aurora Crown Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Crown Commune workable through the obligations of labor foreman while managing the immediate pressure of dome stress, contamination seepage, ration balancing.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of labor foreman credible while absorbing the strain created by dome stress, contamination seepage, ration balancing.

Bastian Sealwater becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with dome stress, contamination seepage, ration balancing around Aurora Crown Commune.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Bastian Sealwater is immediately readable as a labor foreman tied to Aurora Crown Commune.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Aurora Crown Commune: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Bastian Sealwater presents as someone shaped by the duties of a labor foreman and the daily pressures of Aurora Crown Commune.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a labor foreman, and proof that strangers will not make Aurora Crown Commune harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Bastian Sealwater refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a labor foreman too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can mobilize crews, tools, and practical labor access under pressure.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Bastian Sealwater adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Bastian Sealwater always knows more about Aurora Crown Commune than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a labor foreman in Aurora Crown Commune.
